headline: FDA approves Eli Lilly's GLP-1 pill, opening the next phase of the weight loss drug market
summary: The FDA approval of Eli Lilly's GLP-1 pill Foundayo comes nearly three months after Novo Nordisk's oral version of Wegovy hit the market.

raw.headline: FDA approves Eli Lilly's GLP-1 pill, opening the next phase of the weight loss drug market
raw.summary: The FDA approval of Eli Lilly's GLP-1 pill Foundayo comes nearly three months after Novo Nordisk's oral version of Wegovy hit the market.

headline: Elevance sidesteps Medicare Advantage sanctions for now
summary: The insurer had until the end of March to correct faulty data submissions or be hit with severe sanctions from the CMS. But regulators agreed to give Elevance more time to comply.

raw.headline: Elevance sidesteps Medicare Advantage sanctions for now
raw.summary: The insurer had until the end of March to correct faulty data submissions or be hit with severe sanctions from the CMS. But regulators agreed to give Elevance more time to comply.
